title: tina tiny mango mural civilization
prompt: Image 1 is the edit target. Preserve Tina, face, wardrobe, pose, product, car interior, camera, and ordinary street. Image 2 supports her identity and pink gummy only. In a faded wall mural outside the window, reveal a tiny living mango-gummy civilization. Miniature citizens climb a stepped fruit pyramid, carry translucent peel banners, tend glowing orchards, and ceremonially open a giant mango gummy at the summit. The civilization remains partly painted into the stucco while a few figures and banners emerge physically from the wall. Dense visual storytelling, playful archaeological mystery, jewel colors against sun-faded Los Angeles, no sacrifice or violence, no generic candyland, no text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
